test_edgeTicks_positionAtMaxTick().details: Verifies graceful handling at maximum tick boundaryAt MAX_TICK, swapping zeroForOne (price decreasing) should work

test_edgeTicks_positionAtMinTick().details: Verifies graceful handling at minimum tick boundaryAt MIN_TICK, swapping oneForZero (price increasing) should work

test_extremeValues_maxLiquidity().details: Verifies no overflow with maximum liquidity value

test_extremeValues_zeroLiquidity().details: With zero liquidity, no swap can occur

test_priceLimitExactness_exactOutput_hit.details: CRANE-093: When the exact-output amount exceeds what's available before hitting      the price limit, the swap should stop exactly at the limit price.

test_priceLimitExactness_oneForZero().details: CRANE-093: Enhanced with exact equality assertion and input consumption check.      Same reasoning as zeroForOne — SwapMath assigns the target price directly      when the amount specified exceeds the amount needed to reach the price limit.

test_priceLimitExactness_oneForZero_mult.details: CRANE-093: Proves the exact-landing property holds for various price targets

test_priceLimitExactness_zeroForOne().details: CRANE-093: Enhanced with exact equality assertion and input consumption check.      When amountSpecified far exceeds what is needed to reach the limit,      SwapMath.computeSwapStep sets sqrtRatioNextX96 = sqrtRatioTargetX96 exactly.      No rounding tolerance is needed because the mock uses a single-tick swap      and SwapMath assigns the target price directly when the limit is reached.

test_priceLimitExactness_zeroForOne_mult.details: CRANE-093: Proves the exact-landing property holds for various price targets
